---
title: "Visual analysis of software systems in virtual and augmented reality"
author:
  - name: Peter Kapec
  - name: G. Brndiarova
  - name: M. Gloger
  - name: J. Marak
date: "2015-09-01"
categories: [conference paper]
citation:
  type: paper-conference
  doi: "10.1109/INES.2015.7329727"
  url: "https://doi.org/10.1109/INES.2015.7329727"
---

## Links

[DOI: 10.1109/INES.2015.7329727](https://doi.org/10.1109/INES.2015.7329727)
